title: Forgeshot
body:
ForgeShot

Take high-quality screenshots on Forge

By default, to take a huge screenshot use F4 and to open the settings press F6. Everything is editable. --- ### Preview ![Preview image](https://i.imgur.com/pGeB0Im.jpg) --- ### Comparison ![Comparison image](https://i.imgur.com/tOdz8xU.png6699f9846ca) ##### Image by [Donepi](https://twitter.com/donepi_) --- ### Settings Screen ![Settings screen](https://i.imgur.com/fs66Rmi.png) --- #### Credits Icon and idea to [Donepi](https://twitter.com/donepi_) Inspired by [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot)
